creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Please note that non-standard use of github in this port seems mandatory,
because here we need handmade "static" distribution (prepared and published upstream by hand), rather than automatic "dynamic" distribution (generated in real-time by the github robot from sources).
See discussion about it here:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=221634
